articles.title: Inside the cruise ship at the center of a rare hantavirus outbreak - 5 EYEWITNESS NEWS
articles.description: Footage obtained by The Associated Press of a cruise ship in a rare-virus outbreak shows deserted decks and medical teams in protective gear as the vessel and its nearly 150 passengers and crew waited another day for help off West Africa. Officials say three …
articles.content: PRAIA, Cape Verde (AP) Footage obtained by The Associated Press of a cruise ship at the center of a rare-virus outbreak shows deserted decks and gathering areas, medical teams in protective gear, and… [+5800 chars]
